description: DB: converting an accepted quote with mixed lines creates a draft SO holding the product lines (quote_id set, invoice_mode on_fulfillment) and the draft invoice excludes those product lines
DB: getProductAvailability returns on-hand, available (minus open allocations), reorder point, and per-location rows for a tracked product; untracked products marked accordingly
DB: consumption exceeding on-hand is rejected with the available quantity in the error; exact-to-zero succeeds; adjustment and cycle-count paths can still move levels freely
DB concurrency: two parallel consumptions of the last unit — exactly one succeeds, on-hand ends at zero, single consume movement written

DB: adding a tracked material via tickets action and via REST TicketService produces identical rows, stock movements, and on-hand deltas (canonical path parity) (behavioral half in materials.test.ts; delegation locked by materialAuthorizationParity.contract.test.ts)

DB: REST material delete reverses the consume movement for unbilled materials; delete of a billed material is refused — N/A: the public API has no material DELETE endpoint (verified); adding one is out of scope

DB: material add via the canonical path is denied for a user lacking the required permission and allowed for one holding it (static contract half: materialAuthorizationParity.contract.test.ts; RBAC-fixture behavioral half not implemented)
DB: vendor, transfer, and location mutations are denied without their seeded permissions (static contract half: materialAuthorizationParity.contract.test.ts asserts the gates exist)

DB: client 360 read actions return the client's SOs, delivered equipment (with asset links), and RMAs; other tenants/clients excluded — not implemented (UI lane wrote no tests); behavior verified live in browser smoke 2026-07-02

DB: getAssetInventoryProvenance walks asset→stock unit→fulfillment→SO and includes RMA history; returns empty provenance for an unlinked asset — not implemented; positive provenance case verified live in browser smoke 2026-07-02

DB: delivered serialized unit auto-creates an asset with product's default_asset_type; falls back to 'unknown' when unset — not implemented as a test; verified live (asset_type network_device applied on auto-create)

Event: fulfillment emits INVENTORY_SO_FULFILLED post-commit with schema-valid payload (event bus captured/stubbed) — partial: inventoryEvents.test.ts covers publisher+failure isolation; fulfillment call-site not under test

Event: consumption crossing the reorder point emits INVENTORY_STOCK_LOW exactly once; further consumption below the point does not re-emit; rising above and re-crossing re-emits (stockLowSignal.test.ts, real DB rolled back)

Search: indexer output for sales_order, purchase_order, and stock_unit contains the expected searchable fields (number/client, vendor/number, serial/MAC) — not implemented (indexer document shape untested)
DB: getInvoiceLineCogs returns per-line COGS and margin for SO-sourced and material-sourced lines; lines without COGS data return null margin (not zero)
DB: contract profitability includes hardware COGS alongside labor for a contract with material consumption; labor-only contracts unchanged
Export: vendor_bill export batch builds a QBO bill payload (vendor match/create, expense-account lines, amounts) against a mocked QBO client; export status recorded idempotently
DB guard: converting the same quote twice does not create a second SO or re-add product lines to an invoice (idempotency/double-billing guard)
